name: Mercenary
description: Mercenaries offer their services to the highest bidder. They may have an attachment to a faith or flag, but when it comes to doing business, they’re loyal only to the highest bidder.

name: Opportunist
effect: The Mercenary gains +1 Accuracy on attacks when their target is Engaged by an allied character.

active_effects.name: Opportunist
active_effects.detail: You gain +1 Accuracy on attacks when your target is Engaged by an allied character.

name: Bounty Hunter
effect: Before combat begins, the GM chooses a PC: they have a bounty on their head. Any Mercenaries in the combat gain +1 Accuracy on all attacks, checks, and saves against that character – pilot and mech.

active_effects.name: Bounty Hunter
active_effects.detail: You gain +1 Accuracy on all attacks, checks, and saves against the chosen character – pilot and mech.

add_special.detail: You are the target of a bounty. Mercenaries gain +1 Accuracy on all attacks, checks, and saves against you – pilot and mech.

name: Efficient Killer
effect: The Mercenary gains +1 Accuracy and AP on attacks against characters with 2 Structure or less.

active_effects.name: Efficient Killer
active_effects.detail: You gain +1 Accuracy and AP on attacks against characters with 2 Structure or less.

actions.name: Bombardment
actions.detail: Call in a favor: an orbital or artillery bombardment, targeting a Blast 2 area within line of sight and range 30. Characters within the affected area must succeed on an Agility save or take {6/8/12} Explosive damage and be knocked Prone. On a success, they take half damage and aren’t knocked Prone.

deployables.name: Scout Drone
deployables.detail: Deploy the drone to a free space within Sensors. The drone creates a Burst 2 perimeter, within which characters cannot become Invisible or Hide and lose those conditions if they have them. The Mercenary also gains +1 Accuracy when attacking characters within the affected area. The drone can be deployed to a new location as a protocol.

actions.name: Last Word
actions.trigger: You are reduced to less than half your total HP.
actions.detail: Characters in Burst 1 must pass an Agility save or take 2 kinetic damage and become Jammed until the end of their next turn. You then move spaces equal to Speed in any direction. This movement ignores engagement and doesn’t provoke reactions.
